summary: Detailed audit of 15 sub_key_data promotions in the Newton (Sử Thi) pipeline. Each item is evaluated against 3 tests (Scene, Turning Point, Causal Independence). 11/15 promotions are correct (73%). 4 items were incorrectly promoted due to validator bias toward vivid imagery and intellectual significance over actual scene-worthiness. However, even if corrected, the total chapter count remains 17 due to threshold boundaries.
